testcase.name: test_viewer_forbidden
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_62.py:109: in test_viewer_forbidden assert r.status_code in (401, 403), f"Expected 401/403 for viewer, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 401/403 for viewer, got 200: {"ok":true,"owners":["X"]} E assert 200 in (401, 403) E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_completed_viewer_forbidden

failure.message: AssertionError: viewer accessed completed endpoint: 200 assert 200 in (401, 403) + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_62.py:259: in test_completed_viewer_forbidden assert r.status_code in (401, 403), f"viewer accessed completed endpoint: {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: viewer accessed completed endpoint: 200 E assert 200 in (401, 403) E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
